song.title: At Calvary
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Years I spent in vanity and pride, Caring not my Lord was crucified, Knowing not it was for me He died On Calvary.
[C] Chorus Mercy there was great, and grace was free; Pardon there was multiplied to me; There my burdened soul found liberty, At Calvary.
[V2] 2) By God’s Word at last my sin I learned; Then I trembled at the law I’d spurned, Till my guilty soul imploring turned To Calvary.
[V3] 3) Now I’ve giv’n to Jesus everything, Now I gladly own Him as my King, Now my raptured soul can only sing Of Calvary.
[V4] 4) Oh, the love that drew salvation’s plan! Oh, the grace that brought it down to man! Oh, the mighty gulf that God did span At Calvary!
song.author: William R. Newell
